creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Peter Putzer from comment #1)
I considered the first option prior to opening the libressl bug and rejected it. I'm not enamoured with the solution and the compatibility header is a worse solution. This should be fixed upstream.

However thinking about it a little more this morning and considering the libressl folks will probably take some time to fix this I'll temporarily add a workaround for a while.
